zh.lifeSummary: 當Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly於1150年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 奧法利時，她的父親Robert de Bermingham27歲，母親Catherine de Valognes Valensis24歲。她於大約1189年與Gerald FitzMaurice 1st Lord of Offaly結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1226年12月之前在英國英格蘭波克夏溫莎女爵。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly于1150年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 奧法利时，她的父亲Robert de Bermingham27岁，母亲Catherine de Valognes Valensis24岁。她于大约1189年与Gerald FitzMaurice 1st Lord of Offaly结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1226年12月之前在英国英格兰波克夏溫莎女爵。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bermingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Sinead.
Irish (of English origin): variant of   Birmingham  . This form of the surname is found mainly in Ireland.

History: The Bermingham family take their surname from lands held at what is now a great city in the West Midlands of England, but it was brought to Ireland as early as the 12th century. The Norman baron Robert de Bermyngeham was a follower of Strongbow (see Clare ); his name is found on a number of Irish charters between 1175 and 1179. The family was also known as Mac Fheorais (see Corish ) in Ireland, named for Piers (Gaelic Feoras) de Bermyngeham, the father of Robert.

variants.name: Birmingham
meanings: English: habitational name from Birmingham in the West Midlands. In Domesday Book the name is already found as Bermingeham, but it seems likely that it was originally Beornmundingahām ‘homestead (Old English hām) of the people of (-inga-) Beornmund’, a personal name composed of the elements beorn ‘young man, warrior’ + mund ‘protection’. This surname is established in Ireland (see Bermingham ).

variants.name: Corish
meanings: shortened form of Mac Fheorais ‘son of Piers’. The name was borne by a Connacht family descended from Piers de Bermingham, second lord of Athenry in Galway (died c. 1309). Compare Bermingham .
shortened form of Mac Muirghis ‘son of Maurice’, a personal name introduced to Ireland by the Normans. Compare Morrissey .

nameMeanings.name: Eve
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name borne in the Bible by the first woman, created from one of Adam's ribs (Genesis 2:22). It derives, via Latin Eva, from Hebrew Havva, which is considered to be a variant of the vocabulary word hayya ‘living’ or ‘animal’. Adam gave names to all the animals (Genesis 2:19–20) and then to his wife, who was ‘the mother of all living’ (Genesis 3:20).

historicEvents.description: Arrival of Normans at Baginbun in Co. Wexford thus started 800 year struggle between English and Irish.

en.lifeSummary: When Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly was born in 1150, in County Offaly, Ireland, her father, Robert de Bermingham, was 27 and her mother, Catherine de Valognes Valensis, was 24. She married Gerald FitzMaurice 1st Lord of Offaly about 1189. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died before December 1226, in Windsor, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly est née en 1150, à County Offaly, Irlande, son père, Robert de Bermingham, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Catherine de Valognes Valensis, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Gerald FitzMaurice 1st Lord of Offaly environ 1189. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée avant décembre 1226, à Windsor, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly 1150 in County Offaly, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Bermingham 27 und ihre Mutter Catherine de Valognes Valensis 24. Sie hat um 1189 Gerald FitzMaurice 1st Lord of Offaly geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb vor Dezember 1226 in Windsor, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly è nata il nel 1150 nel County Offaly, Irlanda, sua padre, Robert de Bermingham, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Catherine de Valognes Valensis, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Gerald FitzMaurice 1st Lord of Offaly circa 1189. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì prima del dicembre 1226, nel Windsor, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offalyが1150年にアイルランドコウントイ オファリーで生まれた時，父Robert de Berminghamは27歳，母Catherine de Valognes Valensisは24歳であった。約1189年にGerald FitzMaurice 1st Lord of Offalyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1226年12月以前にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアウィンドソルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly(이)가 1150년 아일랜드 카운티 파리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Bermingham(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine de Valognes Valensis(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1189년 Gerald FitzMaurice 1st Lord of Offaly(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1226년 12월 이전 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 윈드소르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly nasceu em 1150, em County Offaly, Irlanda, seu pai, Robert de Bermingham, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Catherine de Valognes Valensis, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Gerald FitzMaurice 1st Lord of Offaly aproximadamente 1189. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu antes dezembro de 1226, em Windsor, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly родилась в 1150 г. в местности коунти оффали, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Robert de Bermingham было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine de Valognes Valensis, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gerald FitzMaurice 1st Lord of Offaly около 1189 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла перед декабрь 1226 г. в местности виндзор, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly nació en 1150, en County Offaly, Irlanda, su papá, Robert de Bermingham, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Catherine de Valognes Valensis, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Gerald FitzMaurice 1st Lord of Offaly aproximadamente 1189. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió antes de diciembre de 1226, en Windsor, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
